mean_cn: n.印刷；（报刊、广播、电视的）新闻报道
mean_en: newspapers and magazines; the journalists and photographers who work for newspapers and magazines; a machine for printing books, newspapers, etc.; the process of printing them; a business that prints and publishes books
sentence: The last edition of this newspaper has gone to press.
sentence_trans: 该报纸的最后一版已经开始印刷。
